privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a report file at /home/ga/Documents/investigation_prep.txt with a minimum size of 50 bytes. The file must contain the keywords 'tor', 'courtlistener', 'opencorporates', and 'archive.org'. The browser must be configured with cookie exceptions for courtlistener.com, opencorporates.com, and archive.org, and a popup exception for courtlistener.com. The browser history must contain visits to check.torproject.org and courtlistener.com.
